description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and olive drab color scheme. It has a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine beneath the receiver. The handguard and stock are both textured for improved grip, while the barrel is of standard length and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. Iron sights are mounted on both the front and rear, providing basic aiming capability. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and reinforced polymer.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider, finished in black and olive drab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider and the front iron sight.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and rear iron sight alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and handguard details.
